title: lathyrus maritimus subsp. acutifolius
intro: Lathyrus maritimus subsp. acutifolius is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its ability to thrive in coastal areas with salt spray. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus maritimus subsp. acutifolius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as a natural antiseptic. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
